reviews.comment:
PESIMA predisposición del personal de la playa de carga. Llegamos con un inconveniente en el auto, siendo que íbamos 2 embarazadas, y ni siquiera no dejaron medir el aceite. Asquerosos, maleducados y super mal predispuesto.

(Translated by Google)
The staff at the loading area were absolutely terrible. We arrived with car trouble, and there were two of us pregnant, and they wouldn't even let us check the oil. Disgusting, rude, and incredibly unhelpful.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14085656854126721512/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURHdHR2Zll3EAE

reviews.comment:
buen servicio

(Translated by Google)
good service
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14085656854126721512/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURHNXZuaHF3RRAB

reviews.comment:
Estuve en la primer semana de nov. Si bien el lugar 4s lindo, no queda tan cómodo del centro. Pero lo peor son las duchas, el agua fría y poca. Tb el trato de algunos empleados con mal genio (no todos eh) tenia en la habitación cosas rotas, q jamas se preocuparon en reparar.

(Translated by Google)
I was there the first week of November. While the place is nice, it's not as convenient to the center. The worst thing is the showers, the cold water, and little to no water. Also, the bad-tempered treatment from some of the staff (not all, mind you). I had broken things in the room, which they never bothered to fix.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14085656854126721512/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURHcFBhejR3RRAB

reviews.comment:
En horas pico demasiado lenta la atencion. Demoras de hasta 30, 40 minutos.

(Translated by Google)
During peak hours, service is extremely slow. Delays of up to 30 or 40 minutes.

reviews.comment:
Única estación de servicio en la Ciudad.
Buena atención y servicio brindado.
Aceptan tarjetas y pago con aplicaciones.
Tener paciencia ya que puede haber algunos vehículos a la cola.

(Translated by Google)
The only gas station in the city.
Good service and attention.
They accept cards and mobile payments.
Please be patient as there may be some vehicles in line.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14085656854126721512/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURHMEw3VU9REAE

reviews.comment:
Atención súper cordial del personal, aceptan tarjetas. Está un poco escondida pero preguntando se llega perfecto.

(Translated by Google)
The staff is extremely friendly and accepts credit cards. It's a bit hidden, but you can easily get there by asking.
